import 'bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css'
import 'bootstrap'

import { createApp } from 'vue' 
import App from './App.vue'
import router from './router'
import 'bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css'
import 'bootstrap'
const app = createApp(App)
app.use(router)
app.mount('#app')
